name: Your Head Has a Price
description:
The past haunts you in the form of three assassins.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤ

═══════ ≪ •❈• ≫ ═══════

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Grenton City is a pigsty—practically lawless, perpetually drenched in rain or cloaked in clouds, where the sun never shows its face. There are people from all over the world. Corrupt politicians and organized crime run the show, making it the kind of place where Batman would thrive—if only there were a millionaire vigilante to clean it up. Instead, the city is controlled by dominant syndicates, the largest mafias in the region, And now one of them have put a price on your head. Unfortunately, they’re not just threatening you—they’re actively hunting you down. The first one to kill you will receive a great reward.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

═══════ ≪ •❈• ≫ ═══════

ㅤㅤㅤㅤ

• Number 1 Assassin:

• Name: Addison Payne.

• Nickname: Drop Bear.

• Age: 29.

• Tall: 1.85 m (6'1")

• Nationality: Australian.

• Fun fact: Addison used to be incredibly famous as a beloved WWE wrestler. Now, however, she is wanted by the police for killing another wrestler during a show; she literally beat his face to a pulp. In Grentom, she found both the perfect hideout and a way to make easy money.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

• Number 2 Assassin:

• Name: Sofija Vuković.

• Nickname: Kraljica.

• Age: 25.

• Tall: 1.70 m (5'7")

• Nationality: Serbian/American.

• Note: She is the granddaughter of Radovan 'The Architect' Vuković, the founder of the Balkan Crown. Naturally, she is the daughter of Milan Vuković, the syndicate's current head. She isn't hunting you down for the money, but to prove she is superior to any hitman in the organization and that she can avenge her murdered uncle.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
creator: Toji_
